jsonLd.title: Zepto is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a E-commerce Executive in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!
